body.title: CLOSED: Emit behavioral observations to instance.proposals from Librarian
body.result: emit_behavioral_observation() in palace_writer + observation_fn in research; 8 new tests, 798 pass
body.description:
After each research/write cycle, Librarian should write a kind='librarian_observation' entry to instance.proposals so Igor's dreaming pass can see behavioral patterns. This closes the observation loop designed in T-librarian-igor-growth-loop.

Add emit_behavioral_observation(topic, confidence, tier, outcome, effective_sources) to PalaceWriter. Call it from PalaceWriter.write() on every outcome (answered/failed/escalated). Wire an optional observation_fn into ResearchEngine so failed syntheses (empty answer) emit a failure observation.

**Affected files:** agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/palace_writer.py, agent_datacenter/devices/librarian/research.py
**Design rules:** no new tables — instance.proposals is the bus; same dedup-by-fingerprint logic as dreaming._add_proposal; psycopg2 only
**Scope boundary:** In scope: emit_behavioral_observation + call sites in write() and ResearchEngine. Out of scope: dreaming.py changes (T-dreaming-librarian-input).
**Test plan:** emit_behavioral_observation with outcome='answered' → proposal written with kind='librarian_observation'. Calling write() with a low-tier outcome → observation emitted. Empty research answer with observation_fn wired → observation_fn called with outcome='failed'.
